declarations.description: Responsive modal web component with desktop centered dialog, mobile bottom-sheet layout, header/content/footer slots, URL hash state, background-click close event, and browser-back handling.
declarations.name: JBModalWebComponent

attributes.name: is-open
attributes.description: Opens the modal when set to "true". Any other value closes it.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Modal id used for URL hash state. When isOpen is true, the modal pushes #id to browser history; when the page loads with #id, the modal opens itself.

members.name: id
members.description: Modal id used for URL hash state.

members.name: config
members.description: Runtime configuration. Set config.autoCloseOnBackgroundClick to true to close on backdrop click and history back.

methods.name: open
methods.description: Opens the modal, sets ariaHidden to false, and pushes #id to browser history when id is set.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the modal, sets ariaHidden to true, and navigates back when the current URL hash matches the modal id.

events.name: urlOpen
events.description: Dispatched when the modal opens itself because the current URL hash matches its id.

events.name: close
events.description: Dispatched for background click and browser back close attempts. event.detail.eventType can be BACKGROUND_CLICK, HISTORY_BACK_EVENT, or CLOSE_BUTTON_CLICK.

slots.description: Default modal content. Rendered inside the content slot fallback.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Header area at the top of the modal content box.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Footer area at the bottom of the modal content box.

cssParts.name: content-box
cssParts.description: The modal content box that contains header, content, and footer slots.
